long_chain: Change the lighting to a warm golden-hour sunset, casting long, soft shadows across the plaza and stairs, while deepening the blue of the sky.
Add falling orange and red autumn leaves scattered across the stone stairs and the plaza, and change the trees on the right to have vibrant fall foliage.
Transform the sky into a dramatic twilight gradient with deep purples and oranges, and turn on warm, glowing lights inside the diamond-shaped windows of the building.
Apply a watercolor painting style to the entire scene, softening the edges of the building and stairs, with visible brushstrokes and a slightly textured paper background.
Cover the stairs and the plaza with a layer of fresh white snow, and add snow caps to the top edges of the building and the lamp posts, changing the atmosphere to a cold winter morning.

Shift the scene to nighttime, illuminating the building facade with cool blue uplighting that contrasts with the warm interior lights, and add reflections of the building on a wet, rain-slicked plaza surface.
Add vertical gardens and hanging vines to the lower sections of the building walls and wrap greenery around the base of the lamp posts, integrating nature into the modern architecture.
Shift the overall color tone of the image to a monochromatic cyan-blue, making the reddish-brown building appear as a cold, metallic structure under a frozen, icy atmosphere.
Fill the lower foreground and the base of the stairs with a thick, low-lying morning mist, obscuring the bottom steps and creating a mysterious, ethereal atmosphere around the building's entrance.

Transform the overall aesthetic into a futuristic sci-fi setting by adding glowing neon strips along the edges of the stairs and building roofline, and replacing the sky with a starry nebula background.
